products.title: Monogram-embroidered Wool-blend  Beanie
products.description: Ruslan Baginskiy Monogram-embroidered Wool-blend Beanie invites you to experience warmth from different angles. 50% wool yarn is meant to keep away the cold. The warm-toned beige color adds on the everyday cosiness. This utility of a hat is leavened with the ribbed texture and hand-embroidered Ruslan Baginskiy logo. products.title: Crystal-embellished Baker Boy Cap
products.description: Ruslan Baginskiy Beige Baker Boy Cap with Crystals A signature shape of the brand in a powdery beige shade. The clean-cut silhouette is enhanced by striking accents — 64 crystals that form the RB monogram and cross, applied by hand. Handcrafted in Ukraine.

products.title: Hand-embroidered Baseball Cap
products.description: Ruslan Baginskiy Pink Monogram Baseball Cap A baseball cap crafted from natural cotton in a new pink shade, part of the Ruslan Baginskiy spring palette. Each piece is hand-dyed. Accented with fine tone-on-tone stitching and finished with signature hand-embroidered RB monogram. Handcrafted in Ukraine.

products.title: Monogram-embroidered Wool-blend Beret
products.description: Ruslan Baginskiy Black Wool Beret Beret — a close-fitting headpiece with a soft shape and signature round silhouette. The structured design makes it easy to style. Made from natural wool in a tightly woven black shade, extending its seasonal versatility. It is complemented by a loop and hand-embroidered RB monogram on the band. Handcrafted in Ukraine.

products.title: Monogram-embellished Sailor Hat
products.description: Ruslan Baginskiy Milk Sailor Hat with Embroidery A distinctive alternative to everyday headwear. Made from cream-colored wool, this sailor hat is finished with matching stitching and hand-crafted RB monogram. Handcrafted in Ukraine.

products.title: Foldable Oversized Hat
products.description: Ruslan Baginskiy Straw Oversized Hat Crafted from natural, tightly woven straw. The silhouette features wide brimmed edges that gently cover the shoulders. The hat is designed to fold easily, making it a convenient accessory for travel. Handcrafted in Ukraine.

products.title: Chain Strap Fedora Hat
products.description: Ruslan Baginskiy Brown Fedora with Chain The fedora — a hat with a defined silhouette, featuring a pinched crown and medium brim. Crafted from natural straw in a warm brown shade, detailed with a removable metal chain, accent piercing, safety pin, and cotton trim. Finished with a hand-embroidered RB monogram. Handcrafted in Ukraine.

products.title: Chain Strap Straw Fedora Hat
products.description: Ruslan Baginskiy Black Fedora with Double Chain A fedora with a signature silhouette, central crease on the crown, and medium-wide brim. Made from natural black straw, it features a detachable double metal chain that can be worn as a standalone accessory. Accented with piercing, a safety pin, and cotton trim. Finished with the hand-embroidered RB monogram. Handcrafted in Ukraine.

products.title: Monogram-embellished Bucket Hat
products.description: Ruslan Baginskiy Straw Bucket Hat The bucket hat is crafted from natural straw. Its clean geometry is enhanced by the texture of the organic material. Hand-woven, it is finished with a straw band and the RB monogram. Handcrafted in Ukraine.
